name: Project Kickoff Task for PM
description: Creates a task for the Project Manager to review contracts and deal details when a deal is active, not lost, and in the Project Pipeline with a known close date.

fields.subject: Complete Contract and Deal Review - WMS
fields.body:
1. Contract & Deal Review

    1. Open the Google Drive folder located in the “About this Deal” section on the left hand side of the deal page and locate the “Sales” folder

      1. Within the “Sales” folder, the proposal, signed agreement and customer’s utility bill to be present. 

        1. Xcel and Black Hills are REQUIRED immediately. For others, if the utility bill is missing, the project can still proceed but PM to reach out to the sales rep to inquire about the status of the document. The interconnection status "waiting on Utility Bill" can be used.

      1. Utility Bill Review 

        1. Ensure the service address on the utility bill matches the address listed in the deal

          1.  

      2. Review contract

        1. Customer signature present

        2.  Agreement price matches “Amount” section on the deal page within HubSpot

        3. Equipment listed in the contract matches the “Line Items” section on the right-hand side of HubSpot

          1. If “Line Items” is blank, please edit and update by clicking on the “+Add” button

            1. Should the equipment not be listed within our system, IT ticket to be submitted with request to add

        4. The address listed on the contract to be in alignment with the service address listed on the utility bill and project deal

          1. PM to make necessary changes/updates

      3. Proposal Review

        1. Determine what the project type is - click all that apply for “Project Type” in the “About this Deal” section in HubSpot

          1. Solar, Battery, Electrical Upgrades, EV Charger, and/or Solar Add-on

        2. Payment type

          1. Look for the “Quotation” page of the proposal - typically located on page 11

            1. Confirm if cash or loan will be used

            2. Ensure “Accounting” section on the left hand side in HubSpot matches payment type

      4. Customer Contact(s) 

        1. Homeowner’s contact page should be listed as an associated contact

          1. The contact responsible for making payment should be listed as the “Payor”

          2. If loan is being used, the person on the loan should be listed as “Payor” & “Loan Applicant” along with the loan provider added as an associated contact and labeled as “Payor”
